title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Martin Omander presents five planning tactics for setting up AI agent projects on complex, existing enterprise codebases: breaking repo walls through multi-repository linking, organizing hierarchical coding rules, containing execution scope with sandboxing and allowlists, using voice input for context gathering, and using agent interrogation to surface fuzzy requirements. The approach treats the AI agent as a digital intern with guardrails established before execution begins.
